content.speakerText: I'm going on a business trip next week. Can you remind me of the reimbursement process?
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周要出差，能提醒我一下报销流程吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! First, book flights with Delta, stay within the $150/day limit for meals and hotels, keep all receipts, and email accounting for pre-approval if needed.
Just remember: use Delta, don’t exceed $150 per day for expenses, save every receipt, and submit your report through system 3B.
The key steps are: pre-approve major bookings, stick to the daily cap, collect receipts, and submit within 30 days after the trip.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整覆盖预订、限额、收据、预批等关键流程
语言准确性：使用正确术语如 'daily cap', 'pre-approve', 'receipts', 'reimbursement'
表达自然度：口语化但结构清晰，有逻辑顺序
